propositions: Produce a cited state-of-the-art report on AI task decomposition, synthesizing independent research with two operator-supplied Downloads reports pinned by SHA-256.
Map decomposition best practices onto what plan-review passes 1, 2, and 4 each measure, respecting their separation of concerns.
Deliver at least 5 recommendations, each with a falsifiable experiment and a false-positive assessment grounded in the repo's plan-review history.
Quantify the signal of tickets whose description was materially edited after entering in_progress as a proxy for plan-review misses.
Segment the edit-signal analysis by whether a prior REVIEW_RESULT exists, excluding reconciler echoes and compacted-history tickets to avoid confounds.
Make no code changes to the gate; recommendations only, with implementation deferred to discovered_from follow-up tickets.
